case_title: MICHAEL RUBIO VS. ZERODIVIDE. NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBIO, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZERODIVIDE. NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIO, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZERODIVIDE. NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $25,170.78 PRINCIPAL, $5,346.67 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,952.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
